diseases.name: Common Cold
diseases.curing: Rest, hydration, and steam inhalation. Most cases resolve within 7-10 days.

diseases.name: Influenza (Flu)
diseases.curing: Complete bed rest, high fluid intake, and monitoring temperature.
diseases.medicine: Antivirals (Oseltamivir), Ibuprofen for aches, Cough suppressants.

diseases.name: Allergic Rhinitis
diseases.curing: Avoiding known allergens, using air purifiers, and saline nasal rinses.

diseases.name: Viral Fever
diseases.curing: Lukewarm sponge baths, light diet, and adequate sleep.
